title: astragalus trichopodus var. lonchus
intro: Astragalus trichopodus var. lonchus, also known as the Longstem Milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to China and parts of Asia, characterized by its distinctive long stems and white or pink flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve overall health. The health benefits of Astragalus trichopodus var. lonchus include reduced risk of illness and infection, improved cardiovascular function, and enhanced respiratory health, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant may include dried root or stem infusions, capsules, or tablets, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
